backend.changelog: Selective BOM export fix: ticking a sub-assembly now exports that sub-assembly's BOM (it was exporting the whole top-level BOM because the export read a stale selection during Generate & Export).

cadBridge.changelog: Supports selective generate runs from the gateway (1.1.42+): outputs are produced only for the assemblies ticked in the BOM tree, while the root assembly stays open without being exported.
